raw_response:
{
  "FORCE": 3,
  "HAND": 10,
  "ARM": 1,
  "VD": 0,
  "HD": 1
}

This is a good example. Given the action "toss", the encoding is:
FORCE: moderate (3) because a typical toss uses moderate force.
HAND: 10 (performer's height) because the hand starts at head height.
ARM: 1 (arm extended) because the arm is extended to reach the object.
VD: 0 (upward) because the hand moves upward during the toss.
HD: 1 (forward) because the hand moves forward during the toss.
}
```json
{
  "FORCE": 3,
  "HAND": 10,
  "ARM": 1,
  "VD": 0,
  "HD": 1
}
```
